infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: When you use Post a photo, KBM Connect uses the camera so you can take a new picture to share on the event activity feed or add to your profile. For example, you can capture a moment at a session and publish it as a post for other attendees.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: When you use Post a photo, KBM Connect accesses your photo library so you can choose an existing picture to share on the event activity feed or add to your profile. For example, you can select a photo you already took and publish it to the feed. This access is also used for the event photo book.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: KBM Connect saves images to your photo library when you choose to—for example, saving a picture from the event photo book to your Camera Roll after you tap save or export.
